text:
Market today: The overall sentiment leans positive, with talk of a "new lease on life" for the bull market. This generally supports your tech/chip heavy portfolio, though geopolitical tensions persist.

Your holdings: SOXL is a major concern, down 23.52% and below its stop of 200. SPAL, a new leveraged ETF, is down 11.17% and nearing its 21.38 stop. Remember, margin amplifies these drops.

Watch: Keep a very close eye on SOXL's price action and SPAL's proximity to its stop. Also, monitor for any specific tech names that demonstrate resilience against AI disruption.

Bottom line: Focus on disciplined risk management for your leveraged, underperforming positions.
plays: Your SOXL is below its 200 stop and marked 'SELL'; consider trimming immediately given its leveraged nature and significant loss.
Watch SPAL closely; if it hits its 21.38 stop, consider exiting to prevent further losses from this new, leveraged position.
If looking to add, LRCX shows a BUY signal on the scanner with entry 349.85-349.23 and stop 347.77.
